{{Quote|I am the last survivor of a crashed cruise liner, the Star Tours Tzarina. If you promise to tell others of our fate, I will tell you where the wreckage is. Perhaps you can find something salvageable there. Agreed?|[[Unidentified Tzarina survivor|A commoner]], to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:ac" />}}
'''''Tzarina''''' was a passenger transport starship operated by the space travel agency [[Star Tours/Legends|Star Tours]] during the early stages of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Description==
{{Quote|Tell the Star Tours company that they need to fix their droids, they're crazy!|A commoner, to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:ac" />}}
A [[Star Tours luxury yacht]], the ''Tzarina'' was the largest ship in the Star Tours fleet at the time of its commissioning.<ref name="SWG:ac" /> The vessel shared many traits with the [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvettes]] manufactured by [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]], particularly the [[Hammer (tool)/Legends|hammer]]-shaped cockpit.<ref name="SWG:CS">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=poi|Crashed Ship|Dathomir}}</ref> Like many other Star Tours ships,<ref name="CDD">{{SW|url=news/convenient-daily-departures-the-history-of-star-tours|text=Convenient Daily Departures: The History of ''Star Tours''|int=Convenient Daily Departures: The History of Star Tours|nolive=1}}</ref> it was piloted by a [[Pilot droid/Legends|pilot droid]].<ref name="SWG:ac" />

==History==
{{Quote|I was one of many who were lucky enough to be some of the first passengers on Star Tours newest luxury yacht. Everything was fine until the droid captain changed course towards Yavin to show us something "neat". The ship was hit by a strange T.I.E. Fighter that was tumbling out of control. Our hyperdrive initiated and drove us straight into this planet. You must let others know...|A commoner, to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:ac" />}}
The ''Tzarina'' was introduced at the time of the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. During its inaugural flight, the vessel was involved in a tragic accident that cost most of its passengers their lives. For unknown reasons the ship's droid captain decided to change course towards [[Yavin Prime/Legends|Yavin]] to show his passengers "something neat". Once there, the yacht collided with an unidentified [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE Fighter]] [[Darth Vader's TIE Advanced/Legends|variant]] that was tumbling out of control through space. The collision caused the Tzarina's [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] to initiate and throw the ship into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]]. When it fell out of hyperspace half a galaxy away it crash landed in the [[Yumaou Risoath]] region of the planet [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]], in [[Quelii sector/Legends|Quelii sector]].<ref name="SWG:ac" />

The crash soon attracted the attention of scavenger beasts in the area looking for food.<ref name="SWG:ac" /> A herd of vicious [[purbole]]s then settled in the wreckage of the ''Tzarina''.<ref name="SWG:CS" /> Only [[Unidentified Tzarina survivor|one passenger]] was known to survive the crash and find his way to the Dathomir [[Trade Outpost]],<ref name="SWG:ac" /> months later.<ref name="CDD" /> There, the commoner told others his story. In exchange for passing on his tale, the survivor offered to tell [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]] the location of the ship and possibly something salvageable within its wreckage.<ref name="SWG:ac" />

The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] later discovered that a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Spy/Legends|spy]] was on the liner at the moment of the crash.<ref name="SWG:LS">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=other|Corellian Corvette Pre-Quest: "Lt. Sabol"}}</ref> In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline">{{SWG_timeline}}</ref> [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Sabol]] dispatched an agent to search for Rebel documents among the wreckage of the ship, in particular documents containing information about the location of a high-ranking Rebel officer that the Empire wanted assassinated.<ref name="SWG:LS" />

Around the same time, the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Kirby (smuggler)|Kirby]] was operating near the crash site.<ref name="SWG:SK">{{GalaxiesNGE}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
The wreckage of the ''Tzarina'' was a location in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:CS" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> The crashed ship was identified as the Star Tours luxury yacht ''Tzarina'' by a [[W:c:swg:Herald NPC|herald NPC]]<ref name="SWG:ac" /> added to the game with the "[[W:c:swg:Publish 1 Notes: 13 August 03|Publish 1]]" update, released on [[August 3]], 2003.<ref name="SonyCite-Publish 1: Nightsisters Cave">{{SonyCite|url=recent_updates.jsp?o=60888|text=Publish 1: Nightsisters Cave}}</ref>

In real-life, "Tzarina" (also spelled "Tsarina" or "Czarina") was a title worn by the the [[Wikipedia:Tsaritsa|empresses]] of [[Wikipedia:Russia|Russia]] before 1917.<ref name="WP">{{WP|Tsaritsa}}</ref>
